caption: A woman with dark hair is positioned in a medium shot, wearing a blue and white striped button-down shirt and over-ear black headphones. She is situated in an indoor setting with a light-colored wall behind her and a sheer yellow curtain to her left. To her right, a neutral-toned piece of furniture is partially visible. The text "Nancy Ramya" appears in the bottom left corner of each frame. Across the sequence, the woman is speaking, and her facial expressions and mouth movements change as she talks. Her head remains relatively still, while her eyes blink and her lips move to articulate words. The background and her attire remain constant throughout the clip, with the only movement occurring in her facial features as she continues to address the camera.
